Definition: Drilling contractors or rig owners contracting services for well drilling.

Equipment manufacturers & service/supply providers for oil & gas wells. Includes: seismic data collection & equipment distributors. Excludes: oil spill services (see Environmental & Facilities Services).
Integrated companies exploring & producing oil & gas, plus significant activity in refining, marketing, transportation, or chemicals.
Exploration & production of oil & gas, not classified elsewhere.

Refining & marketing of oil, gas &/or refined products not classified elsewhere. Includes: producers of ethanol, biodiesel & eco-diesel. Excludes: retail gas stations, automotive components/lubricants (see Automotive Retail) & fuel dealers (see Oil & Gas Storage & Transportation).

Storage &/or transportation of oil, gas &/or refined products, including midstream natural gas, pipelines & shipping. Includes: petroleum distributors/dealers. Excludes: natural gas transmission for end users (see Gas Utilities).

Production & mining of coal & other consumable energy fuels like bituminous coal, uranium, biomass, hydrogen & petroleum coke. Excludes: industrial gases (see Industrial Gases) & metallurgical coal for steel (see Steel).

Producers of industrial & basic chemicals. Includes: plastics, synthetic fibers/rubber, films, commodity paints/pigments, carbon black, explosives, lubricants & petrochemicals. Excludes: chemicals in Diversified, Fertilizers & Agricultural, Industrial Gases or Specialty Chemicals.
Diversified chemical manufacturers not classified in Industrial Gases, Commodity, Specialty, or Fertilizers & Agricultural Chemicals.
Producers of fertilizers, pesticides, potash & other agriculture-related chemicals.
Manufacturers of industrial gases (Oxygen, Nitrogen, Hydrogen, Carbon Dioxide, Dry Ice, Helium, Acetylene). Excludes: energy-producing Hydrogen (see Coal & Consumable Fuels).

Producers of high value-added chemicals like fine chemicals, additives, advanced polymers, adhesives, sealants & specialty paints/coatings. Includes: fragrance/flavor chemicals & industrial enzymes. Excludes: battery production chemicals (see Electrical Components & Equipment).
Manufacturers of sand, clay, gypsum, lime, aggregates, cement, concrete, bricks & refractory materials. Excludes: finished building materials (see Building Products).
Manufacturers of metal, glass or plastic containers, corks & caps. Excludes: glassware (see Housewares & Specialties).
Manufacturers of paper/cardboard containers, plastic packaging, wood containers & related packaging.
Producers of aluminum & related products. Includes: bauxite mining/processing & aluminum recycling. Excludes: aluminum building materials (see Building Products).

Diversified extraction of metals & minerals. Includes: nonferrous metal mining (except bauxite), salt, borate, phosphate rock, sand & gravel. Excludes: iron ore (see Steel), bauxite (see Aluminum) & coal (see Steel or Coal & Consumable Fuels).
Copper ore mining & manufacturing of basic copper products (rods, tubes, wires). Excludes: electrical copper wires (see Electrical Components & Equipment).
Producers of gold, including mining, processing & finance houses investing in gold mines.
Mining of precious metals/minerals not classified in Gold. Includes: platinum group metals, diamonds & precious stones.
Silver mining. Excludes: companies in Gold or Precious Metals & Minerals.
Producers of iron, steel & related products. Includes: iron ore mining, metallurgical coal mining & ferrous metal foundries.
Manufacturers of timber & wood products. Includes: timber tracts, nurseries, lumber & plywood.
Manufacturers of all paper grades. Includes: newsprint mills, converted paper products, pulp & paperboard. Excludes: paper packaging (see Paper & Plastic Packaging).

Manufacturers of civil/military aerospace & defense equipment/parts. Includes: military shipbuilding & defense support/logistics services. Excludes: defense consulting (see Research & Consulting Services).
Manufacturers of building components & home improvement equipment. Excludes: lumber/plywood (see Forest Products) & cement/materials (see Construction Materials).
Non-residential construction. Includes: civil engineering & large contractors. Excludes: Homebuilding.
Producers of electric cables, wires & components not in Heavy Electrical. Includes: motors/generators (non-automotive), lighting, fuel cells, solar systems, batteries & related raw chemicals.
Manufacturers of power-generating & heavy electrical equipment like turbines & large fixed-use systems. Excludes: cables & wires (see Electrical Components & Equipment).

Diversified industrials across 3+ GICS Sectors, none yielding majority revenue, with controlling operational stakes. Excludes: non-controlling holding companies (see Multi-Sector Holdings) & mono holding companies.
Manufacturers of heavy duty trucks, earth-moving equipment & related parts. Includes: non-military shipbuilding.
Manufacturers of agricultural/farm machinery. Includes: crop/livestock machinery, tractors & fertilizing equipment.
Manufacturers of industrial machinery/components. Includes: presses, 3D printers, machine tools, compressors, elevators & pumps.
Distributors of industrial equipment/products (chemicals, construction materials, metals, paper). Includes: equipment lessors & online B2B industrial platforms.
Commercial printing services. Includes: media industry printers.
Environmental/facilities maintenance. Includes: waste management, pollution control & carbon trading. Excludes: large water treatment (see Water Utilities).
Providers of office services & manufacturers/distributors of office supplies/equipment.

Labor-oriented B2B/government support. Includes: catering, commercial cleaning, equipment repair, uniform rental, physical document storage & debt collection for defaulters. Excludes: debt portfolio purchasing (see Consumer Finance).

Security/protection services. Includes: correctional facilities, armored transport & guarding. Excludes: security software (see Systems Software), home security (see Specialized Consumer Services) & equipment manufacturing (see Electronic Equipment).
HR management services. Includes: employment agencies, payroll, recruiting & paid online job portals. Excludes: ad-supported job portals (see Interactive Media & Services).

B2B/government research & consulting. Includes: credit bureaus, management consulting, architectural design, market research & testing. Excludes: IT consulting (see IT Consulting) & ad/marketing agencies (see Advertising).
Commercial data processing & BPO services. Includes: customer experience management, call centers & investor communications.
Air freight, courier & logistics services. Includes: package delivery & customs agents. Excludes: Passenger Airlines, Marine, & Ground Transportation.
Passenger air transportation.
Goods or passenger maritime transportation. Excludes: cruise-ships (see Hotels, Resorts & Cruise Lines) & oil/gas shipping (see Oil & Gas Storage & Transportation).
Goods & passenger rail transportation.
Ground transportation for goods/freight.
Passenger ground transportation. Includes: buses, taxis, vehicle rentals & ride-sharing platforms.
Airport operators & air traffic control/support activities.
Owners/operators of roads, tunnels, railtracks & road support activities.
Owners/operators of marine ports & marine support activities.
Manufacturers of auto/motorcycle parts & accessories. Excludes: Tires & Rubber.
Manufacturers of tires & rubber.
Producers of passenger autos & light trucks. Excludes: motorcycles (see Motorcycle Manufacturers) & heavy trucks (see Construction Machinery).
Producers of motorcycles, scooters or 3-wheelers. Excludes: bicycles (see Leisure Products).
Manufacturers of TVs, home audio, game consoles & digital cameras. Excludes: computers/smartphones (see Technology Hardware) & appliances (see Household Appliances).
Manufacturers of soft home furnishings, furniture, carpets & wall-coverings.
Residential construction (homes, apartments). Includes: prefab houses & residential contractors. Excludes: real estate development (see Real Estate).
Manufacturers of electric household appliances & power/hand tools. Excludes: TVs/audio (see Consumer Electronics) & computers (see Technology Hardware).
Manufacturers of durable household products (cutlery, cookware, glassware, crystal).
Manufacturers of sports equipment, bicycles, toys & arcade games.
Manufacturers of apparel, accessories, handbags, luggage, jewelry & watches. Excludes: Footwear.
Manufacturers of sport & leather shoes.
Manufacturers of textiles not classified in Apparel, Footwear or Home Furnishings.
Operators of casinos, resorts & betting websites. Includes: lottery services & casino equipment/software. Excludes: arcade games (see Leisure Products).

Operators of hotels, resorts & cruise-ships. Includes: travel agencies & online vacation marketplaces. Excludes: ad-supported travel info sites (see Interactive Media) & casino hotels (see Casinos & Gaming).
Operators of sport/fitness centers, stadiums, golf courses & amusement parks.
Operators of restaurants, bars, fast-food. Includes: food delivery & catering.
Educational services (online/conventional). Includes: private universities & technical education. Excludes: employee training (see Human Resources).
Consumer services: home security, legal, personal care, interior design, auctions, day care & wedding/funeral services.
Distributors/wholesalers of consumer merchandise & autos. Includes: online B2B consumer platforms.
Retailers offering wide consumer discretionary merchandise. Includes: discount/department stores & online marketplaces.
Retailers of apparel, footwear & accessories. Includes: direct-to-consumer apparel brands.
Retailers of consumer electronics, computers & smartphones.
Retailers of home/garden improvement & building materials. Includes: household repair services.
Retailers of jewelry, cosmetics, toys, office supplies, books, tobacco & art. Includes: duty-free shops.
Retailers of autos, motorcycles, parts & gas stations.
Retailers of furniture & interior design. Excludes: Home Improvement Retail.
Retailers of drugs & pharmacies.
B2B distributors of food products. Includes: online B2B food platforms.
Retailers of food products.
Retailers of consumer staples (food, household, personal care). Includes: hypermarkets, supercenters & online staples marketplaces.
Producers of beer & malt liquors. Excludes: Restaurants.
Producers of alcoholic beverages not classified in Brewers.
Producers of mineral waters & sodas. Excludes: milk, coffee, tea & juices (see Packaged Foods & Meats).
Producers of agricultural products, crops & animal feed. Excludes: Forest Products & Packaged Foods & Meats.
Producers of packaged dairy, coffee, tea, juices, meats & pet food.
Manufacturers of cigarettes/e-cigarettes. Excludes: cannabis products.
Producers of non-durable household products (detergents, cleaners, tissue). Excludes: Paper Products.
Manufacturers of cosmetics, perfumes, diapers, hygiene products & dietary supplements. Excludes: curative products (see Pharmaceuticals).
Manufacturers of lasting/reusable medical, cardiovascular & diagnostic equipment.
Manufacturers of disposable health care supplies (eye care, hospital supplies, syringes).
Distributors/wholesalers of health care products.
Providers of patient health care services (dialysis, lab testing, pharmacy management) & health care BPO staffing.
Operators of hospitals, nursing homes, rehab centers & animal hospitals.
Operators of HMOs, PPOs, CDHPs & health/dental benefit plans.
IT services/software for health care providers.
R&D/manufacturing of genetic analysis/engineering products. Includes: protein-based therapeutics. Excludes: non-healthcare biotech.
R&D/production of pharmaceuticals, APIs & veterinary drugs.
Analytical tools, clinical trial & contract research services for pharma/biotech.
Large, geographically diverse banks with retail/corporate lending & diverse financial services. Excludes: Regional Banks, Mortgage Finance & Investment Banking.
Banks/thrifts operating regionally via conventional retail/corporate lending & mortgages from deposits.
Providers of diverse financial services (banking, insurance, capital markets) with no dominant line.
Significantly diversified holdings across 3+ GICS Sectors (non-controlling stakes). Includes: controlling-stake diversified financials. Excludes: Industrial Conglomerates.
Specialized finance providers (commercial financing, central banks, leasing, pawn shops). Excludes: Financial Exchanges.
Non-deposit mortgage lending, loan servicing, mortgage brokers & mortgage insurance.
Digital/mobile payment processors, gateways & digital wallets.
Personal credit, credit cards, lease financing & discounted debt portfolio recollection. Excludes: Mortgage Finance.
Investment management & custody services. Includes: mutual funds. Excludes: commercial lending/brokerage.
Equity/debt underwriting, M&A, securities lending & advisory.
Diversified activities across corporate lending, investment banking, brokerage & asset management.
Exchanges for securities/crypto & providers of financial decision tools/ratings.
Trusts servicing/originating mortgages & mortgage-backed securities.
Insurance & reinsurance brokerage firms.
Life, disability & supplemental health insurance. Excludes: Managed Health Care.
Diversified life, health & property/casualty insurance.
Property, casualty, financial & title insurance.
Reinsurance providers.
IT & systems integration consulting. Excludes: defense consulting (see Research & Consulting).
Data centers, cloud networking, web hosting & domain registry. Excludes: Software.
Specialized business/consumer software. Includes: enterprise, cloud & bitcoin mining software. Excludes: Interactive Home Entertainment & Systems Software.
Operating systems, database management & firewalls.
LAN/WAN routers, modems, fiber optics & broadcasting equipment. Excludes: smartphones (see Technology Hardware).
Smartphones, PCs, servers, printers, ATMs & crypto mining hardware. Excludes: Semiconductors.
Test/measurement instruments, lasers, display screens, POS machines & security equipment.
Connection devices, PCBs, capacitors, resistors & signal processing tech.
OEM electronics manufacturing.
Distributors of software, hardware, communications & electronic equipment.
Semiconductor/solar manufacturing equipment, raw wafers & packaging systems. Excludes: PCBs (see Electronic Components).
Solar modules, integrated circuits, LEDs, microprocessors & chips. Includes: packaging/test services.
High-bandwidth/fiber-optic transmission & satellite telecom services.
Fixed-line/wireless telecom, ISPs & telecom tower operators. Excludes: tower construction-only (see Construction & Engineering).
Cellular/wireless telecom & in-flight internet.
Advertising, PR, market research & digital marketing.
TV/radio broadcasting systems & networks.
Cable/satellite TV networks & program distribution.
Print/electronic publishers of newspapers, books & non-data financial journals.
Production/distribution of movies, TV, music, streaming content & sports teams.
Interactive gaming, mobile games & educational home software. Excludes: online gambling (see Casinos & Gaming).
Ad-supported search engines, social media, online classifieds & content sharing. Excludes: commission-based sites (see Hotels, Resorts).
Nuclear/non-nuclear electricity generation, transmission & distribution.
Distribution/transmission of natural/manufactured gas & propane. Excludes: Gas Exploration & Storage/Transportation.
Significantly diversified electric, gas &/or water utilities.
Water redistribution, treatment, supply systems & steam heating.
IPPs & energy merchants. Excludes: renewable electricity & transmission/distribution (see Electric Utilities).
Generation/distribution of biomass, geothermal, solar, hydro & wind power. Excludes: renewable equipment manufacturing.
Trusts with diversified operations across 2+ property types.
Industrial warehouses & distribution properties.
Hotel & resort properties.
Office properties.
Hospitals, nursing homes & assisted living properties.
Apartments & multi-family/student housing.
Single-family housing & manufactured homes.
Shopping/outlet malls & community shopping centers.
Pipelines, gas stations, fiber optics, prisons & parking properties.
Self-storage properties.
Telecom towers & wireless structures.
Timberland & timber-related properties.
Data center properties.
Diverse real estate development, management or services with no dominant line.
Operating properties for leasing/management.
Developing & selling properties. Excludes: Homebuilding.
Real estate agents, brokers, appraisers & data tools. Excludes: ad-supported online platforms (see Interactive Media).
